creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Upgrade devel/rubygem-jeweler to 1.8.8; add STAGE support.

There is nothing in the change log for 1.8.8, but the commits are on GitHub:

https://github.com/technicalpickles/jeweler/commits/v1.8.8

From ChangeLog.markdown:

# jeweler 1.8.7, 2013-08-12

 * Lock timecop version to 0.6.1 to keep support of 1.8.7 #243
 * Bump version in version.rb to reflect released gem version
 * jeweler's Rakefile reads version from version.rb
